sentence: Twinfo lands differently when you're already in your meafloaf state.

wombos.definition: Information shared between twins, or insider knowledge passed between people with a twin-level connection.
wombos.example: She slid me the twinfo before anyone else even knew what was happening.

wombos.definition: The flow state of being fully, effortlessly yourself — the condition in which authenticity and peak performance merge seamlessly.
wombos.example: I wasn't even thinking — I was deep in a meafloaf state.
